title: Lipid follow-up

investigations.text: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped lipid, renal, liver, glycaemic, blood-pressure, and BMI monitoring fields.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

investigations.text: Links statin review to documented ALT and cholesterol or lipid results before clinician prescribing decisions.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped adverse-effect and laboratory monitoring fields without selecting treatment or dose.
investigations.evidence_extract: Links statin review to documented ALT and cholesterol or lipid results before clinician prescribing decisions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

investigations.text: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented adherence, adverse-effect review, lifestyle and cardiovascular risk discussion, repeat lipid and liver testing, annual medication review, and agreed follow-up without mapping doses.

source_limitations: The workflow does not enforce the adult population in the NICE source.
Chest-pain negatives, generic vital signs, heart rate, general appearance, and generic clinician plans remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, medicine selection, dose, and risk interpretation remain clinician-stated and qualified clinician review is still required.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
